name: Flames of Genesis
description: Notes Part of the Daeva Trickster Set.
effects: On Shoot: Release a ring of fire when In Combat. Shots: 12 (arc gap: 30°) Damage: 350-450 (400) Projectile Speed: 0.2 tiles/second Acceleration: -5 tiles/sec2 after 0.5 seconds Minimum Speed: 0 tiles/second Lifetime: 4 seconds Range: 1.4 Effects: Paralyzed for 3s Shots hit multiple targets Shots pass through obstacles Ignores defense of target Cooldown: 3 seconds
